name: research-os
description: A taste-first Research Operating System for Claude Code. Six commands — three generate (/prospect problem-hunting, /forge four-axis approach-forging with a regenerating backlog, /autopsy negative-metabolism + programme pulse), three discipline (/prereg evidence contract, /exp-verify real-run check, /adversary the single claim-boundary gate). One invariant everywhere: a verdict that helps the proposer if gamed is never granted by the proposer — DOWN verdicts self-administrable, CLAIM_STANDS independent-substrate only, contribution promotion human-only. Four generative axes: schools (how to think) · types (what output) · frames (which mathematics) · operators (which modeling move). Anti-accretion rule: fixed parts budget, one-in-one-out. Bundles the Arbor MCP idea-tree.
